creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bsam
Date: Wed Sep 19 14:26:22 2012
New Revision: 304519
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304519

Log:
  Add trytond_analytic_invoice 2.4.1, tryton Application Platform
  (Analytic Invoice Module).
  
  PR:		ports/171499
  Submitted by:	matthias@petermann.it

Added:
  head/finance/trytond_analytic_invoice/
  head/finance/trytond_analytic_invoice/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_analytic_invoice/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_analytic_invoice/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_analytic_invoice/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/finance/Makefile

Modified: head/finance/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 14:24:41 2012	(r304518)
+++ head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 14:26:22 2012	(r304519)
@@ -114,6 +114,7 @@
     SUBDIR += trytond_account_stock_anglo_saxon
     SUBDIR += trytond_account_stock_continental
     SUBDIR += trytond_analytic_account
+    SUBDIR += trytond_analytic_invoice
     SUBDIR += trytond_calendar
     SUBDIR += trytond_carrier
     SUBDIR += trytond_carrier_percentage

Added: head/finance/trytond_analytic_invoice/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_analytic_invoice/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 14:26:22 2012	(r304519)
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+# Created by: Matthias Petermann<matthias@petermann.it>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	trytond_analytic_invoice
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.1
+CATEGORIES=	finance python
+MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads2.tryton.org/${PORTVERSION:R}/
+
+MAINTAINER=	matthias@petermann.it
+COMMENT=	Tryton Application Platform (Analytic Invoice Module)
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	trytond>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond \
+		trytond_analytic_account>=2.4.1:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_analytic_account \
+		trytond_account_invoice>=2.4.1:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_account_invoice
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/finance/trytond_analytic_invoice/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_analytic_invoice/distinfo	Wed Sep 19 14:26:22 2012	(r304519)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (trytond_analytic_invoice-2.4.1.tar.gz) = 395723b30311a9afd9e4a788d2c6e3bce07c020994a4f1d93d5f1cbd371883f5 
+SIZE (trytond_analytic_invoice-2.4.1.tar.gz) = 19643

Added: head/finance/trytond_analytic_invoice/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_analytic_invoice/pkg-descr	Wed Sep 19 14:26:22 2012	(r304519)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+This port adds the Analytic Invoice Module to the Tryton Application Platform.
+
+WWW: http://www.tryton.org/

Added: head/finance/trytond_analytic_invoice/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
